name: PAX Smell Proof Bag
summary: The PAX Smell Proof Bag upholds your standard of living while remaining discreet.
description: The PAX Smell Proof Bag upholds your standard of living while remaining discreet. It guarantees the well-being, protection, and odour control of your items. Featuring designated compartments, stretch pockets, and dividers, it offers efficient and superior storage for your PAX, Era, and other essential cannabis products. Its water-resistant design safeguards your stash against spills and moisture, while the scent-proof materials maintain its discreetness. Keeps prescribed flower at its best for longer.
